beer.beer_description:
A beer for the champs, the sloggers, and the battlers. Diehards Original Lager salutes our true-blue local Rugby League team — Valleys Diehards. Just like its namesake, this full-strength beer gives 110 percent. They say when you join the Diehards family, it becomes part of your DNA — in the same way this lager recipe has become part of ours. This is a crisp, easy-drinking, ‘proper lager’ that won’t let the team down.

Malt: Pale Malt and Flaked Rice

Hops: Topaz

items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 275 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 56!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 455 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 92!
After a long day, what better way to kick back than with a crisp and refreshing lager? You're already feeling more relaxed, aren’t you?. That’s 115 different Lagers! Try 5 more for Level 24!

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 30 distinct venues!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 10 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 3!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 25 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 6!
